column1: C[usabilitynz: I have to go. I am making Sushi. I am turning Japanese Michael.
C[usabilitynz: We are off for a 20 min walk
C[usabilitynz: I will resign this game. A big win for you. I will do better next game.
miclee111: you did well at my botom right corner, almost got me, but you missed some oppotunities
C[usabilitynz: Have to start packing for our move. Will be away for rest of the day
C[miclee111: you caught me again. good on you
C[miclee111: waiting for your new challenge
usabilitynz: I will start a new game
usabilitynz: I will play again tomorrow
C[usabilitynz: I will be away for three days.
C[usabilitynz: Hi Michael, I think it's time to start a new came. I did badly in this one. I have lost almost all my groups, and what I have left is small.
C[miclee111: you have to work harder
miclee111: you got top right and bottom right conners left
usabilitynz: Yes, you are right, I have to put more into the game. I will start a new game.
C[saya: Hi, good luck, have fun :)
saya: The clock will start when you play.
C[usabilitynz: well done. You are too good!
C[miclee111: just come back from work
C[usabilitynz: Ha, evening shift. I hope my desk is still there.
C[usabilitynz: I am off now. Back tomorrow afternoon.
C[miclee111: there is sands and an ambrella around your desk. a note says ""he is having holiday""
C[miclee111: you are in trouble again
C[usabilitynz: this is not looking good
usabilitynz: this could be one of my worst games
miclee111: you are not thinking carefully
C[miclee111: what a big mistake I have made, I was talking over the phone
C[usabilitynz: I know, but you can afford this one mistake.
C[usabilitynz: Moving back tomorrow, and after that to wellington until Sunday
C[usabilitynz: I think it is time to pass
usabilitynz: Yes I now see what you are doing in the right-bottom. It will remain unresolved. There is a term for this type of situation.
C[usabilitynz: Wow........ unbelievable. will start a new game
C[usabilitynz: We are moving to Wellington on March 9.
C[miclee111: I thought you are there now
miclee111: by the way, I started work for cdhb just before Christmas
C[usabilitynz: Nice one. Is it computer based work?
C[miclee111: Thanks, you know the lunar new year too
C[miclee111: you didn't know i made a mistake?
C[usabilitynz: I do not like what I see Michael.
usabilitynz: A lot of stones look lost.
C[miclee111: at least you have three corners
C[usabilitynz: How is your job going?
C[miclee111: great, I like the job
C[usabilitynz: Are you ok with all the flooding?
C[miclee111: no flooding in my area, thanks
C[usabilitynz: I will not be able to play for a short time. We are moving tomorrow.
C[miclee111: After the earthquake in Christchurch, it makes sense to move to Wellington to escape earthquake
usabilitynz: You are right, could get one i Wellington now
C[miclee111: Would it be alright if you make 4 moves to the 4 corners at the beginning of the game next time?
C[usabilitynz: No, this is a big loss. I resign.
C[usabilitynz: Went to the Chinese exhibition at Te Papa. Very immersive.
C[usabilitynz: Will be offline until Monday NZ time.
C[usabilitynz: Yes this is another really bad game for me.
C[usabilitynz: On a lighter note, I won my first tournament game last night by 6.5 points.
C[usabilitynz: This is the worst game ever. I resign.
miclee111: you have many chances to fight back but you never bother.
miclee111: for example, on the left hand side, you can capture my 4 white stones
miclee111: at the bottom left, you can capture 8 white stones then your 2 strings of blacks can join together
miclee111: attack is the best defend
C[usabilitynz: I do not like the look of any of this.
C[usabilitynz: The 9 stones left bottom centre are not looking good.
C[usabilitynz: This game seems rather hopeless for me.
C[miclee111: You have played better now
C[miclee111: you have one last move at 19D
usabilitynz: Yes. I Have lost a lot of stones. Not very good.
C[usabilitynz: I will start a new game

C[miclee111: I have thought for a long time if i want to make the move on 18C. If i did and you make a move on 18B, i will lost the corner. however i thought you might do something not wise and make a move on 18D. I was right

C[usabilitynz: I think you are able to predict my moves most of the time. You are also of course quite an exceptional player. I cannot believe how good you are. I am luck I also play against lesser players. I won a game by 14.5 points on sunday morning.
C[miclee111: Good to hear you played well and won
C[usabilitynz: Today we have finally moved into our own house.
C[miclee111: know that feeling when you are homed
C[usabilitynz: I will be in AKL for the next two days.
C[usabilitynz: A good win for you. This time I did not lose a big group this time. I will start a new game.
C[miclee111: Last game was a land mark winning for you, in which you didn't lost any big group, instead, you captured the my corner
C[miclee111: Last game was a land mark winning for you, in which you didn't lost any big group, instead, you captured the my corner
C[usabilitynz: Not so good for me
C[miclee111: Shall we finish this game quickly? not much to go now
usabilitynz: Yes, I pass. Good win for you. I will start a new game.
C[miclee111: play it tomorrow, good night
C[miclee111: tom, time to go to bed. see you tomorrow
C[usabilitynz: I am off to bed now. Alarm goes at 5.45
C[usabilitynz: I am going out now. see you later.
C[miclee111: your last several moves are good. you are working hard to beat me
C[usabilitynz: Yes, I am playing better in this game compared to the others. I have to go now - see tomorrow.
C[miclee111: shall we start a new game?
usabilitynz: Yes, well played Michael. Have invited you to a new game. I am enjoying this. I am off to bed now.
miclee111: Black wins means you won
C[usabilitynz: Good game so far. My next move will be the last one for today. See you tomorrow.
C[usabilitynz: That was my last move for today.
C[usabilitynz: Sorry I have been away. Have not been well.
C[usabilitynz: I have to go now. Back later.
usabilitynz: We will begin a new game tomorrow and look over this game at work next week. Off to bed now. Thanks for the game Michael.
C[usabilitynz: Have entered this tournament: http://nova.gs/tournaments It starts this Monday. should be interesting.
C[miclee111: you finally get to the point where I can not copy your move
C[usabilitynz: I am off to bed now.
C[miclee111: be back half an hour
C[miclee111: please do not resign until i finish
C[miclee111: just keep removing white stones
C[miclee111: you need to remove all white stones you can inside your area
C[miclee111: make it easy for counting the result
C[miclee111: ok you can resign now
C[usabilitynz: Yes, that's a big win Michael!!
miclee111: i want you to see the result and remember it, see next time if you can do it better
usabilitynz: I will challenge  to our next game
miclee111: to stop me copying your move, you could have placed a stone in the middle at a very early stage
miclee111: then when i can not copying your move, you then could copy mine to give it back to me
miclee111: we will talk about this when i come back to work
C[usabilitynz: I have to go now.
C[usabilitynz: I have to go now.
C[usabilitynz: I have to go now
C[usabilitynz: Good morning Michael - you must still be in bed :-)
C[usabilitynz: Off for my walk now
C[usabilitynz: I need to think. Back in the morning at work
C[usabilitynz: wow, things are not looking good.
miclee111: you have played well at the bottom left
usabilitynz: You play like a spider.
C[miclee111: you only got top left & right corner
usabilitynz: I know. It is a big loss. I will resighn this game and we will start a new one tomorrow morning. I must make sure I do not lose such big groups.
C[usabilitynz: I am off to bed.
C[usabilitynz: I have to stop playing now.
C[miclee111: teat time now, be back later
C[usabilitynz: I am off now until tomorrow.
C[usabilitynz: I have send you an email about Kaya Go Server
usabilitynz: I think I should resign and start a new game. What do you think?
C[usabilitynz: have to go. back in the morning
C[usabilitynz: I am away for the rest of the evening
C[usabilitynz: I did not even see that. I should be shot at dawn
C[usabilitynz: Will now be away for rest of the day
C[miclee111: Please make some moves to clean yp those captured stones
miclee111: let's start a new game
C[miclee111: leave this one paused for review later
usabilitynz: you need to pass a couple of times in this game to finish it
C[usabilitynz: Hi, Have a good game.
C[usabilitynz: Hi, Have a good game.
C[miclee111: you are in trouble....big trouble
C[usabilitynz: I think it is time for me to pass now
C[miclee111: click accept removed stones button to accept the result
usabilitynz: I will start a new game today

usabilitynz: I think we are reaching the end of this game
miclee111: Let's finish it quickly and I will go to work soon
miclee111: i made 3 big mistakes in this game
miclee111: if you caught the first two, you could have turned the table around
miclee111: you caufgt the third mistake, which saved you the bottom right corner
miclee111: the second mistake was hugh. if you didn't move 1M, instead move 1J, you could have captured my white string in the middle, which would save you the middle group and the corner
miclee111: i will review it with you later
C[miclee111: I know you would go 13O
miclee111: that is a common mistake
miclee111: funning here when you enter 13
C[usabilitynz: Melbourne is great. two cold days 16. Today will be 22. Off to see old friends today.
C[miclee111: you are in trouble, again
miclee111: if you made the moves like that, you would have saved your corner. See from 1 to 7, white can not put a move into the 5 position, black can go 7A position to remove white stones.
C[miclee111: Have you had a look at the Variation: d1?
usabilitynz: No. I just play a couple of moves each morning. we have quite a busy schedule. Will look at the variations when I get back. Off to Brisbane this morning.

miclee111: but you didn't know that
miclee111: if you go R11 before I did, you may still have some chances
miclee111: do you you can use the ""Analyze Game"" button to 'drilling' your moves before submit your move?

usabilitynz: yes, you are right about that
C[usabilitynz: Yes now it looks just so bad. This game is my worst result so far.
C[miclee111: now you lost the top left corner

miclee111: didn't know about that. you challrnge me and start with 5 moves, one at the centre and 4 corners

C[miclee111: there are still chances for you. if you can capture some of my stones, your centre group will live

C[usabilitynz: Ok. I will start a new game.

miclee111: a record for you as well
C[usabilitynz: You are quite brilliant Micael!
C[miclee111: i knew what you were going to do...
miclee111: so i prepared a trick ...
usabilitynz: Yes, a trick it was - I did not see what was coming until the end!!
miclee111: i enjoy seeing you falling into my trick
usabilitynz: It's good for me - I am slowly learning to be more careful. in our next game I will try and not get into close combat with you.
usabilitynz: I should never have let that top right corner go.
miclee111: the mistake was your move 17T
C[usabilitynz: Probably not much point playing on here
C[usabilitynz: A new record I think

C[miclee111: have a nice trip. i have to stay at work

miclee111: i thought you were still working on
C[miclee111: Each game you lose by more than 100 points, i suggest next game you start with 1 more moves or otherwise 1 less moves.
C[usabilitynz: Yes, that could be an idea.
miclee111: next game you start with 5 moves
C[usabilitynz: Well, I should have done a lot better.
